Time: No on-site parking. Reserved spots at Presbyterian Church (65 South St) and Verizon Lot (39 Maple Ave) available 2-3 weeks pre-show.
MPAC lots are CASH ONLY day-of-show. Municipal garages (DeHart St) use card/app.
Accessible seating on Orchestra level only. Elevator access to Balcony. 10 wheelchair locations available.
Assistive listening devices and sensory kits at Guest Services. 2-week notice for ASL or Audio Description.
All sales final. No refunds/exchanges. Children over 1 must have a ticket.
Bag search at entry. Backpacks and large luggage strictly prohibited.
Available from Verizon and DeHart lots for select shows starting 2 hours prior to curtain.
Seating at discretion of House Manager during appropriate breaks.
